session_1.speaker: Ann
session_1.text: I finally adopted a rescue greyhound last weekend, named him Comet.

session_1.speaker: Ben
session_1.text: Congrats! I remember you wanted a calm breed for the small apartment.

session_1.speaker: Ann
session_1.text: Yes, and Comet sleeps most of the day, which suits my night shifts at the observatory.

session_2.speaker: Ben
session_2.text: I started a pottery class on Tuesdays at the community studio.

session_2.speaker: Ann
session_2.text: Nice, is that the studio near the old tram depot?

session_2.speaker: Ben
session_2.text: Exactly, and the first project is a set of ramen bowls.

session_3.speaker: Ann
session_3.text: Comet chewed through my telescope dust cover, so I ordered a padded one.

session_3.speaker: Ben
session_3.text: Ha! My ramen bowls came out of the kiln glazed in cobalt blue.

session_3.speaker: Ann
session_3.blip_caption: a greyhound sleeping next to a telescope

qa.question: What kind of dog did Ann adopt?
When did Ben start pottery class relative to Ann adopting her dog?
What did Comet damage and what replaced it?
qa.answer: the telescope dust cover, replaced by a padded one

qa.question: Does Ann work night shifts, and where?
What color car does Ben drive?

session_1.speaker: Ada
session_1.text: My sourdough starter finally survived a full week, I call it Bubbles.

session_1.speaker: Kai
session_1.text: Third attempt is the charm. Are you still baking on Sundays?

session_2.speaker: Kai
session_2.text: I signed up for the coastal marathon in October, training starts next month.

session_2.speaker: Ada
session_2.text: Brave! I will bring Bubbles bread to your finish line.

qa.question: What did Ada name her sourdough starter?
Which race did Kai sign up for and when does training begin?
qa.answer: the coastal marathon in October, training starts next month
